# Vũ Yên Research — AI access guide

Quant research service for Vinhomes/Vingroup (HOSE) and the Vũ Yên
(Royal Island) property project in Hải Phòng, Việt Nam.

## Preferred: MCP server (read + write)
Run: `python -m app.mcp_server` (stdio).
Claude Code: `claude mcp add vuyen -- python -m app.mcp_server`
Tools: get_market_snapshot, get_signals, get_group_comparison,
get_recent_candles, get_psm_data, get_events, get_outlook,
add_psm_point, add_event, set_outlook_scenario.
Writes edit data/*.json — the same files this web app renders.

## REST (read-only)
/api/candles?ticker=VHM · /api/events · /api/psm · /api/outlook?series=vhm
/snapshot · /signals · /group · /satellite/image (Planet) · /api/planet_metrics · OpenAPI at /docs

All data descriptive/historical. Not investment advice. HOSE prices in
thousands of VND. Every curated point carries a public source.
